chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2262 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For hearing of CMA No.10547/2020 (stay) 2. For hearing of Main Case 28.03.2022 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-. Counsel for the petitioner states that provisional release has been made, Department may be directed to make final assessment. The Department therefore is directed to make final assessment as per Section 25 of the Customs Act, 1969 within shortest possible time. Instant petition stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE SM
